audit_items.proof_trace: The request validation only limits the number of identifiers to max_request_blocks_deneb (128) at decode time in codec.rs:562-570, but does not validate the total column count. An attacker can send 128 identifiers each with 128 columns for 16384 total columns, exceeding MAX_REQUEST_DATA_COLUMN_SIDECARS. The handler at rpc_methods.rs:408-460 processes all requested columns without checking the sum against spec.max_request_data_column_sidecars.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends DataColumnsByRoot request with 128 identifiers, each containing max columns per identifier. Total columns requested = 128 * number_of_columns() which can exceed 16384. Node processes all columns, consuming excessive memory and CPU for reconstruction/validation, enabling resource exhaustion DoS.
